About us

A small team, a large ambition

We build tools for product teams who want to ship consistent, beautiful software — without a 10-person design ops department.

4,000+

teams in 68 countries

12 M

components generated

99.99%

uptime in the last year

37

people, no VCs

Meet the team

Engineers, designers, support engineers, and one cat. Distributed across nine timezones.

Our story

2019

Two Figma files and an idea

Priya and Eben ship v0 over a long weekend after the third time they had to hand-translate colours between Figma and Tailwind.

2021

First 1,000 paying teams

The free tier grows to 60,000 users. We hire a second engineer and stop sleeping through Slack pings.

2023

v2 ships — component library opens up

Every component is now themeable through tokens. The Pro tier exists and is profitable from month one.

2026

v3 — real-time and AI-assisted

Multi-cursor co-edit, token suggestions from natural language, and a public changelog API. 37 of us, no VCs.
